function.name: get_day_of_year
function.description: Get the day of year (1-366) for a date.
function.long_description: Returns the ordinal day number in the year (1-366) for a specified date, along with leap year information.
example_user_queries: whats the day of the year for the date 2023-03-15?
Call get_day_of_year with date 15/08/2026 and format %d/%m/%Y.
Execute get_day_of_year and include leap year info.
determine the day of year for 2021-12-31.
How many days into the year is 2023-07-04?
Calculate day of year for 2022-02-28 and check if it's a leap year.
